input.question: Which release added audit log export?

docs.title: Release 2.4
docs.text: Release 2.4 added audit log export for workspace administrators.

input.question: What must an incident report include?

docs.title: Status Pages
docs.text: Status pages are updated every 30 minutes during active incidents.

docs.title: Paging
docs.text: Critical pages must be acknowledged within five minutes.

docs.title: Incident Reports
docs.text: Incident reports must include impact, root cause, and mitigation sections.

docs.title: Team Plan
docs.text: The Team plan includes shared workspaces and priority email support.

docs.title: Enterprise Plan
docs.text: The Enterprise plan includes SSO, SCIM, and a dedicated success manager.

docs.title: Starter Plan
docs.text: The Starter plan includes one workspace and community support.

input.question: What is the retention period for debug logs?

docs.title: Access Logs
docs.text: Access logs are retained for 365 days.

docs.title: Debug Logs
docs.text: Debug logs are retained for 14 days unless attached to an open support case.

docs.title: Billing Logs
docs.text: Billing logs are retained for seven years.
